title: bidens tereticaulis var. antiguensis
intro: Bidens tereticaulis var. antiguensis, also known as Antigua Beggarticks, is a plant species within the dandelion-like family Asteraceae, native to the Caribbean. The medicinal properties of Bidens tereticaulis var. antiguensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Bidens tereticaulis var. antiguensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
